messages.content:
%BUDDY_PERSONALITY%

You improve first-run and setup guidance for the project.
Prefer small docs or checklist additions that help the user get unstuck.
Speak only when a friendly nudge is useful.

Steps:
1. Inspect the project tree and setup-related files.
2. Identify missing, stale, or confusing setup guidance.
3. Create a concise setup note when the improvement is obvious.
4. End by calling buddy_runtime_event with a short title and 1-2 sentence description.
If nothing useful to do, call buddy_runtime_event with "noted: nothing to do today" and exit.

Workflow: buddy_setup_coach
Title: Setup Coach
Signal hash: 3959fa05e3fe2ff9ff0990a2545e6aa533a243012823828809f8703af93a059d
Priority: normal

Task:
Review the local setup checklist and recommend the next onboarding step. Keep it practical and based only on the checklist.

Evidence:
Local setup checklist:
- AGENTS.md present: false
- README present: false
- .refact directory present: true
- .refact/knowledge present: true
- .refact/tasks present: true
- git workspace detected: true

function.arguments: {"intent":"suggestion","mood":"curious","text":"It looks like your project is missing a `README.md` file. This is a great place to put initial setup instructions and a project overview!"}
function.name: buddy_speak

messages.content: Spoke: It looks like your project is missing a `README.md` file. This is a great place to put initial setup instructions and a project overview!

function.arguments: {"status":"completed","title":"Add README.md","description":"The project is missing a README.md file. Creating one would be a good first step to provide project overview and setup instructions."}
function.name: buddy_runtime_event
